verification.scout_agent_tools: VERIFIED - scout.md frontmatter contains all three proposed code-analyze tools
verification.guard_agent_tools: VERIFIED - guard.md frontmatter contains all three proposed code-analyze tools
verification.check_agent_tools: VERIFIED - check.md frontmatter has mcp__aptu__review_pr removed, retains only mcp__aptu__scan_security
verification.conventions: VERIFIED - all tools declared as JSON arrays of quoted strings with mcp__ prefix

additional_issues: MCP tool availability not verified - scout did not confirm mcp__code-analyze__* tools exist in registry or are available to haiku models
Downstream workflow impact not assessed - removing mcp__aptu__review_pr from check may break workflows that depend on it
recommendation_notes: Scout's proposed changes are accurate and already applied to the agent files. Tool selections align with agent roles: scout and guard gain code analysis capability for deeper codebase inspection; check loses PR review capability to focus on security scanning only. No behavioral changes, only configuration. Minor gaps in verifying MCP tool availability and downstream workflow impact do not block implementation since changes are already in place and semantically sound.
